title: The Stars Will Tell, Inspector Palmu
writer: Matti Kassila, Kaarlo Nuorvala, Mika Waltari
actors: Joel Rinne, Matti Ranin, Leo Jokela
plot: Inspector Palmu investigates the death of an old astronomer, whose body is found on Helsinki's Observatory Hill, but the investigation is complicated by the media's spreading of false information concerning the case.
